basic_details.job_title: RNSB Jr Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Rajkot Nagarik Sahakari Bank (RNSB) has officially released a recruitment notification for Jr Executive. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 09-06-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 16-06-2026

age_limit.details: Maximum Age limit: 30 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RNSB Jr Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for RNSB Jr Executive Recruitment 2026 is 16 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. When did the online application process start for RNSB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process commenced on 09 June 2026 through the official RNSB website.

faq.question: Q3. What is the post offered under RNSB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Rajkot Nagarik Sahakari Bank (RNSB) is recruiting candidates for the post of Junior Executive (Jr Executive).

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for RNSB Jr Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit prescribed for the Jr Executive post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per the bank's rules.

faq.question: Q5. What educational qualification is required for RNSB Jr Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a First Class Graduate degree (except Arts) or a Postgraduate degree (except Arts) from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q6. Is work experience required for RNSB Jr Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates having 2 years of experience in any cooperative bank or financial institution will be preferred. However, freshers are also eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q7. Is computer knowledge mandatory for the Jr Executive post?
faq.answer: Yes, applicants should be well versed in computer operations and applications, as mentioned in the official notification.
